title: Robata Roasted Northern Irish Reblochon Skewers
description: A spicy and crispy meal prep dish featuring reblochon and robata grill, with a vegan friendly twist, inspired by Northern Irish cuisine.

ingredients.name: Smoked tofu
ingredients.notes: marinated in soy sauce and maple syrup

instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 200 degrees Celsius.
Thread the reblochon cheese, smoked tofu, red onion, bell pepper, and mushrooms onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the cheese is melted and the vegetables are tender.
Brush the skewers with robata sauce during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let the skewers cool completely before refrigerating or freezing for meal prep.
Reheat the skewers in the oven or microwave before serving.
